nasb.text: Therefore we do not lose heart, but though our outer man is decaying, yet our inner man is being renewed day by day.

esv.text: So we do not lose heart. Though our outer self is wasting away, our inner self is being renewed day by day.

cnv.text: 所以，我們並不沮喪，我們外面的人雖然漸漸朽壞，但裡面的人卻日日更新，

ccb.text: 所以，我们不气馁。身体虽然日渐衰残，内在的生命却日日更新。

csbs.text: 因此我们不丧胆。即使我们外在的人渐渐衰朽，我们内在的人还是日日被更新。
